best_qa_per_chain.question: Westworld season 1 premiere date 2016 HBO
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Westworld season 1 premiered on Sunday, October 2nd, 2016. This was the most-watched first season of any HBO original series until The Last of Us in 2023.

citations.title: HBO Announces October 2nd Premiere Date for Westworld Series

best_qa_per_chain.question: Westworld first season actual release year confirmation
best_qa_per_chain.answer: The first season of Westworld premiered on HBO on October 2, 2016, and concluded on December 4, 2016. It consisted of ten episodes and was subtitled 'The Maze.'

best_qa_per_chain.answer: Westworld season 1 premiered on HBO on October 2, 2016. The series was created by Jonathan Nolan and Lisa Joy and is based on the 1973 film of the same name.
